race.comment: EFFORTLESSLY (9) resumes today after ending last campaign on a disappointing note as favourite. The form out of that worked out well however and she'd shown glimpses of ability prior. CJP sticks from her latest trial and she does possess some early speed. Can return on a winning note. SNIPELISA (14) has trialled well coming into her debut campaign, winning her latest heat at Lark Hill. The wide draw is a niggle, though Parnham's booking is a good push for her chances. Expecting to see her in the finish if she gets some luck in running. KENTUCKY DRIVE (6) resumed in solid order at Ascot when beaten 3.4L over the short course. Fitter and further are both ticks and she can make her presence felt. MAMMA SAYS SO (7) is knocking on the door of a maiden win and rates highly on her recent form, though the gate is a query. BAHNBOUGLE BABY (11) is next best third-up from the inside.
